title: AnimCraft
description: A Resource Pack that makes your items come to life by animating them
body:
**AnimCraft** is a unique resource pack that takes Minecraft’s visuals to the next level by animating every 2D item in the game. From tools and weapons to food and materials, every item now has life and motion — making your inventory feel dynamic and alive.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31c6f5deec2f549623117aec4dc6389c5255c3f1.png)

🔥 Vanilla-Friendly Style – All animations stay true to Minecraft’s default aesthetic — just more vibrant and engaging.

🧰 Full Coverage – Includes all tools, weapons, food, materials, potions, and more!

⚙️ Lightweight & Optimized – No bulky textures or performance drops. AnimCraft runs smoothly on most systems.

![5 Animated items in item frames perfect for your likings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f0849481d5da22daccd8e14d67cb5086208ed08.png)

<details>
<summary>Video</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SCsJwrKlDuA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>



🎨 Perfect for Immersion & Style – Great for content creators, PvP players, and survival adventurers alike.

![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ab399d0449973ce12333321e91d8707d1b94513.png)
- ✅ Minecraft 1.21
- 🎮 Fully compatible with OptiFine and shaders.
- 🧱 Works seamlessly with most other packs (as long as item textures aren't overwritten).

> Every item is **NOT** supported for now
> If you don't like the iron animation i suggest downloading this resourcepack https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animcraft-iron-tool-animation-remover
